hero.heading: HackatGIKI
hero.description: Build. Compete. Innovate. Shape the future of AI.

steps.title: Apply
steps.description: Submit your application individually or with a team of up to 4 builders.

steps.title: Ideate
steps.description: Choose a challenge track or bring your own AI moonshot idea to life.

steps.title: Hack
steps.description: 24 hours of intense building, supported by world-class mentors & tools.

steps.title: Pitch
steps.description: Present your functioning prototype to our panel of elite judges & VCs.

schedule.heading: Event Weekend
schedule.description: A high-octane 24-hour sprint. Kick-off on Saturday night, pitch to the judges Sunday night. All global hubs mirror the same tight schedule (PKT).
